headline: Reassessing Pfizer (PFE) Valuation As Shares Trade Around Recent Levels
summary: Pfizer (PFE) is back in focus after recent trading left the shares around $27.32, prompting investors to reassess the company’s value score of 3, revenue of $62.6b, and net income of $7.7b. See our latest analysis for Pfizer. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 9.11% 90 day share price return and an 8.50% year to date share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return sits at 11.80%. However, the 3 year total shareholder return remains negative at 18.17%, so recent momentum...
